title: Menzies Aviation India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Menzies Aviation India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
We at Menzies Aviation India are looking for an experienced Guest Relations Manager based out of Surat. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Menzies Aviation India:
Menzies Aviation India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Menzies Aviation India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
